title: Jungle Zombies
description: Adds the Jungle Zombie from Minecraft Dungeons.
body: Adds the Jungle Zombie mob from Minecraft Dungeons. These zombies spawn in biomes defined by the #wich:spawns_jungle_zombies tag [default `minecraft:jungle`, `minecraft:bamboo_jungle`, and `minecraft:sparse_jungle`]. When sheared by a player, they drop vines. Jungle Zombies' attacks can poison the player.
